entry.title: Re: c4c v2 - How do we get the historical changes done to...
entry.content:
Hi Kunal,

Thanks for answering.

I have tried the lifeCycleStatus entity within the OpportunityService. 

Its just the master list of available lifeCycleStatus' applicable for any Opportunity. It does not represent the history of any Opportunity.

Thanks,
Pratik

entry.title: Re: On-stack Clean Core Extensibility: Plain and Simple
entry.content:
It's a good blog.

I agree that AEM is an approach that deciding which technologies to use to meet requirements. In other words, it means that it is not easy to develop only with the Clean Core way. I'm not sure which one is easier that an old system consisting only of Tier 3 vs. running a system mixed with Tiers 1 to 3. 

I think this is why Clean Core is difficult in Brown Field. I expect SAP to provide migration guide for Tier 3.

entry.title: Emissions data for the services used under RISE with SAP
entry.content:
Our customer is using S/4HANA Private Edition and SAP Analytics Cloud. They need to report the emissions data across the IT landscape, including the ones under RISE with SAP. 

How are the RISE customers getting the emission figures and the values allocated for their usage? Any dashboard within SAP for Me?

regards

Anil

entry.title: Re: Regarding "Data Overview" of SAP for Me
entry.content: 質問があります。 https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/dataoverview で、2024年10月はシステム「SID_100」の結果が、2024年11月はシステム「SID_000」の結果がそれぞれ表示されています。 10月と11月でクライアントが異なるにも関わらず、Used、Fragmented、Freeの合計サイズが、10月の「SID_100」と11月の「SID_000」で同一です。 また、このサイズはS/4HANAのトランザクションコードDBACOCKPITから「現在のステータス」→「概要」を選択することで確認できる「データベースディスク使用率」の「ディスクサイズ」と一致しています。DBACOCKPITで確認できるこのサイズはクライアントごとではなく、ディスク全体のサイズを表している認識です。 EWAジョブはクライアントごとに実行されているとしても、ディスク使用率の情報収集はクライアントごとではなく、ディスク全体の情報を収集しているのではないでしょうか。 SAP for Me（ https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/dataoverview ） に表示される「HANA Disk Usage」は、クライアントごとではなく、ディスク全体の結果ではないでしょうか。

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Connecting to Messaging Systems using the AMQP Adapter
entry.content:
Hi @mandy_krimmel 

That last screenshot is from the Event Mesh UI Client, I´m inspecting the message directly in the broker.

The future consumer, is a BTP APP, so no iflow will consume that message. The idea is to create a Request/Reply Async pattern using the CorrelationID, so the BTP APP can place a new message as a response.

Anyways I´ll try to inspect the message with a different client (iflow + Allowed Headers // Node.js Client) to check if that EM UI Client might not be showing certain message properties.

Thank you very much for your response

Mikel

entry.title: Re: BSEG-EBELN and EBELP not populated at BTE 1120 structure
entry.content:
Some hints

  • Did you start from 2782220 - MIRO: Account assignment object is filled in FI Document from Invoice - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA 
  • Check Field Status Group associated to Account number, does it allow input of PO number and item number
  • Be aware the BTE wont affect FAGLFLEXA/ACDOC only BSEG
  • Are fields related to invoice set (REBZG, REBZJ, REBZZ)

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM: requirement approval with external workflow management system
entry.content:
Hi,

Today, custom approval status is not available. You can use the task API to add comments.

entry.title: Re: Outbound Delivery show error msg: VL063
entry.content:
Hello @0819 

Your requirement is unclear to me. The over-delivery tolerance will apply to the entire sales order quantity

For example,

The customer has placed an order for 10 units, with an over-delivery tolerance of 10%, divided into two schedule lines of 5 units each.

When creating the delivery for the first schedule line, you can deliver all units if sufficient stock is available. However, if you deliver only 7 units, the remaining 3 units for the second delivery will allow a maximum of 4 units to be delivered, considering the over-delivery tolerance

Conclusion : For the example above, you can deliver a maximum of 11 units.

Please apply same logic for you business requirement.

Please check and let us know

Best Regard

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: What You Need to Know About Blogging Post-Migration
entry.content: Hi all, I have a very general question: Is it only the author of a blog post who can edit a post after publication? Or is it also possible for someone else to make changes? Or would it in theory be possible to change the author of a published post to a different user? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Create link between Handling Unit and Inbound Deliver...
entry.content:
Hello,

This is not yet possible (Hus for inbound deliveries are technically a bit different than “normal” Hus)

We have this feature on our list for new development. We hope this will be developed soon. But I cannot guarantee that this will be already available in the next main release.

Regards,

Ansgar

entry.title: Re: On-stack Clean Core Extensibility: Plain and Simple
entry.content: @JAEUK Thanks. I just had to clarify the bit about AEM because, in our situation, it was somehow perceived as something that can help you decide if something that is clean or not, which is not its purpose. For us, it was fortunately decided to go greenfield, which makes the journey to clean core considerably easier. Having to migrate all the legacy code from a 20-year old SAP system and trying to make it clean has a much lower chance of success, IMO.

entry.title: SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08 Released – Safeguarding Customer Investments and Maximizing Value
entry.content:
With the general availability of SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08 as of November 20, 2024, we’re introducing significant enhancements to improve scalability, reliability, user experience, and reduce the total cost of ownership. The SAP HANA database currently supports over 70,000 customers, powering some of the world’s most critical applications and workloads. Our customers, partners, and internal teams value SAP HANA for its stability, reliability, sustainability, ease of use, and cost-effectiveness. With SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08, we’ve focused on these priorities to protect our customers’ investments, while continuing to drive value in this leading translytical and multi-model database platform.

 

Broad Range of Innovative Features and Benefits

SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08 introduces a range of valuable new features that make the in-memory computing environment more accessible and user-friendly. These enhancements empower more team members to obtain rapid insights and make data-driven decisions. Additional improvements focus on reducing the total cost of ownership, boosting scalability and data reliability, enhancing user experience, and more.

 

Here are just some of the many significant new features, capabilities, and enhancements you’ll find in SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08:

  • Backup & Recovery now supports AES-256-CTR encryption for persistency, log and backup.
  • SAP HANA Native Storage Extension (NSE) now automatically applies recommendations and supports dynamic aging for range partitions, which automatically creates new range partitions.
  • Partitioning now includes three-level partitioning with Range-Range-Hash and Range-Range-Range type of partitions and comes with an enhanced multistep partitioning wizard in the SAP HANA Cockpit.
  • SAP HANA now restricts the connections between the user group members using IP / Network addresses, applications, and authentication method conditions.
  • X.509 certificates now supports additional wildcard values.
  • The SAP HANA Database Explorer is now available as an extension for Visual Studio Code.
  • Enhanced Machine Learning capabilities in multiple areas, like classification, time series, forecasting, and regression, to support the development of next-generation intelligent applications.
  • Updated SAP HANA Smart Data Access & Smart Data Integration  adapter certifications and new data provisioning capabilities, allowing for improved and seamless data federation and replication capabilities.
  • Modeling enhancements for column-based pruning and greedy pruning, along with the support of user-defined functions in expressions of calculated columns and filters, which provide better performance and more data modeling flexibility.
  • Updated XSA Runtimes for TomCat, Node.js, and SAPMachine provided for continued deployment flexibility.
  • Enhanced SAP HANA on-premises to SAP HANA Cloud migration assistant in SAP Build now supports XSC to XSA and CAP migrations.

 

Future Release & Maintenance Strategy

Starting with SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08, we’re planning to deliver new SAP HANA 2.0 versions every 2 years and always in Q4 of the respective calendar year. In addition, each SAP HANA 2.0 version will provide a 4-year maintenance period. This will provide a clear and predictable SAP HANA release and maintenance approach. In addition, customers will always have a 2-year overlap between two consecutive versions, offering sufficient time to plan and upgrade to the most recent version. 

 

Want to learn more about the new SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08 release? If so, please register for the upcoming “What’s New in SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08 Overview Session” delivered by our SAP HANA Product Management team.

Check out the detailed What’s New Sessions that are scheduled on YouTube Live to learn more about the various enhancements.

If you have questions, please visit the SAP Community Q&A for SAP HANA or submit your question directly.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Platform Trial 1909 Available Now
entry.content:
@julieplummer20 What!? 5 years, you say? It cannot be! Where has the time gone? 😊

I am glad you still offer this trial. I think it is important to foster learning and innovation in the community to give developers a system to play with.

entry.title: Re: Meaningless "posted a topic/replied to topic", instead use "question", &quot
entry.content: Thank you, Sandra. Your feedback has been received. We will get back to you as soon as we have updates.

entry.title: Re: Can we create the new depreciation key in sap in SAP...
entry.content: My client has a requirement for the SLM Depreciation Key with a 5% cut-off. However, this Dep Key is not currently available in South Africa. Could you please advise on the process to obtain it.

entry.title: Re: FILTER Button in TABLE CONTROL
entry.content: Please help I got same requirment to add filter functionality in table control in mpp

entry.title: Re: FILTER Button in TABLE CONTROL
entry.content: Please send me the code As I got same requirment

entry.title: Perform SAP Principal Propagation with Microsoft Entra ID for SAP SuccessFactors!
entry.content:
This blog is co-authored with Vinayak Adkoli (Lead Product Manager, SAP Integration Suite, SAP SE). Link to Microsoft Learn Hub for Power Platform and SAP here🔗.

Dear community,

The last blog post showed how to integrate Microsoft and SAP low code solutions with SAP services using the API Management capability of SAP Integration Suite and Microsoft Entra ID as identity provider overall. Todays post is about the specifics for SAP SuccessFactors.

Spoiler alert🤫: the approach stays the same! Only a slightly modified API Management policy needs to be imported. SuccessFactors uses API keys for its SAML assertions rather than an OAuth2 client id and contains your SuccessFactors company id.

 

Technically you could use the same policy for NetWeaver based systems and SuccessFactors, because the “unexpected” authentication attributes are ignored as of the releases that were tested. It is a good practice though to separate the concerns. Therefore we published a separate policy instead of a one-size-fits all one with bloated number of attributes.

At the core of the solution is again the proven OAuth2SAMLBearer flow. See the official SuccessFactors docs on the required SAML attributes for reference.

In addition to that, solving this challenge on Integration Suite level enables scaling the approach to arbitrary many different consumer solutions. No more re-inventing the wheel for every developer!

Find the SuccessFactors specific policy on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

Of course, you may deviate from the blueprint outlined based on your scenario across SAP BTP, SAP Graph, Integration Suite, other SAP SaaS solutions etc.

 

A glimpse under the hood

Start your journey on SAP API Management by creating a new API provider for your SuccessFactors tenant. Be aware☝️ of the different domains for the portal UI and the associated OData API endpoint! See SAP note 2215682 for reference.

 

Next, register your SuccessFactors OData API. In my sample I am taking the entity set “User”, that resides on the base path for a tenant in DC5 like so:

https://api5.successfactors.eu/odata/v2/User/$metadata

Make sure to verify the base path of the URL (/odata/v2 vs. /odata/v2/User) of your target endpoint on API Management. See below Screenshot for reference.

Otherwise, you will encounter routing issues for request like /odata/v2/User(‘1000’).

 

The API Management policy works under the assumption that trust between your SAP SuccessFactors OAuth2 server and Microsoft Entra ID has been setup before. See this guide for reference.

In addition to the existing authorizations maintained on SuccessFactors each application consuming the SAP API proxy from API Management need to be authorized on Entra ID.

 

See this official guide for details on the Entra ID setup. Be aware the linked guide refers to the SAML2 setup (not OAuth2!). See the difference for OAuth2SAMLBearer below:

 

The Entity ID can be any URI. It is a good practice though to use something that resembles your SuccessFactors tenant.

Be aware that Entity ID must be unique in your Entra ID tenant. In case you want to use SAML2 for SSO and OAuth2 for SAP Principal Propagation for this tenant at the same time, you need to maintain both on the Entra ID enterprise app registration. Assign an order (index) that works with your login flow.

 

Take care of your OAuth settings

The steps for the OAuth configuration may vary by SAP product. Here the focus is on SAP SuccessFactors.

Move on to your SuccessFactors tenant and open the app “Manage OAuth2 Client Applications” to create a new OAuth client for your Microsoft Entra ID enterprise app. Populate the values as per your environment.

Be aware that you need to copy the certificate body only without the header -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- and -----END CERTIFICATE-----.

 

Import the policy into your tenant

Download the policy from the SAP Business Accelerator Hub and import the template into your SAP API Management tenant.

 

Apply to all the PostFlow steps of the TargetEndpoints of your APIs as you see fit. See this SAP tutorial and this SAP GitHub repos for more details.

 

Consider the governance and security trade-offs between mighty policies and SAP OAuth clients authorized for everything vs. a multitude of clients for each API and scope.

 

Configure the policy using a key value map

All the configuration needed for earlier shown token exchange flow is best provided with an encoded key value map (I recommend starting with un-encoded one, when you do this the first time for simpler troubleshooting). Create a new encrypted one called “SAPPrincipalPropagationMap”. The name is referenced on the provided policy.

 

Fill the values as per your environment:

Key

Value sample

Hints

entra-id-tenant-id

12a345bc-1234-56ab-78ab-zzzzzzzzz

Find it on the Azure portal (e.g. here)

issuer

https://sts.windows.net/12a345bc-1234-56ab-78ab-zzzzzzzzz/

The prefix is fixed. Only the tenant id is dynamic.

 

https://login.microsoftonline.com/12a345bc-1234-56ab-78ab-zzzzzzzzz for v2 endpoints

entra-id-audience

api://999abce-7777-abcd-a6c9-zzzzzzzzzzz

The globally unique Application ID URI from the Entra ID app registration representing your SAP API Management instance

AADRegisteredAppClientId

999abce-7777-abcd-a6c9-zzzzzzzzzzz

The Application (client) id of the Entra ID app registration representing your SAP API Management instance.

AADRegisteredAppClientSecret

 

The secret created for the application 999abce-7777-abcd-a6c9-zzzzzzzzzzz

AADSAPResource

https://my.successfactors.eu

The provider’s name from your SuccessFactors SAML setup.

sap-oauth-sf-api-key

ABCDE1234FGH6789

API Key generated by SuccessFactors for your OAuth2 application. Instructions here.

sap-oauth-company-id

SF123456

Your SuccessFactors Company id. Find here.

SAPOAuthServerAdress

ForTokenEndpoint

salesdemo.successfactors.eu

OAuth endpoint of your successfactors instance.

 Adjust the name of the API provider as per your setup in the policy elements “fetchSAPOAuthToken”, and “GetCSRFToken”.

The final mile of integration

Ok, all homework is done. Now we get to go outside and enjoy the “low code” sun with SAP SuccessFactors 🌞Create your SAP OData connection in Power Automate, choose the authentication type Microsoft Entra ID and paste the URI of the Entra ID app registration that represents your API Management.

 

Hints on troubleshooting

  • Before applying the APIM policy consider running the sequence of authentication calls locally (with “line of sight” to NetWeaver of course) using a REST client. See this Postman collection for reference.

 

  • Verify the produced Entra ID tokens attributes using a safe JWT validator (e.g. DevToys). Don’t share your sensitive tokens on some website for validation!
    • iss (Issuer): Should read something like https://sts.windows.net/12a3456-zzz... or https://login.microsoftonline.com/12a3456-zzz... for v2 endpoints.
    • aud (Audience): Something like “api://bbbbbb-cccc-dddd-dddd-eeeeeeee”
    • scp (Scope): “user_impersonation”

 

  • For the SAML2 assertion exercise the same approach but do base64 decode and XML pretty print. Notepad++ with MIME tools -> Base64 decode and XML Tools -> pretty print does the job locally just fine. Again, don’t paste sensitive info online! Verify the following claims from your assertion:
    • AudienceRestriction -> Audience: Should be a URL containing your app id, e.g. https://my.successfactors.eu
    • Claims: Name, email or whatever you have configured to be used to identify the named SAP backend user.

 

  • While doing integration tests with the API Management policy consider decoding the key value map or use a public one till you are confident with your setup to see immediately what config values were provided.

 

  • Verify that your key value map changes are being pulled.

 

  • Cached a faulty token? Disable the caching policy step "LookupSAPTokens" using the enabled attribute on the XML or consider adding an API to clear the cache by user using the "InvalidateCache" policy step. 

 

  • 405 Method Not allowed (SAP note 3386802 SAP API Management generates PUT method entries for OData v2 and PATCH entries for OData v4 services. Power Automate's "Update entity" step uses the PATCH approach. In case of conflict, either choose the "Create any type of OData request" step and configure PUT instead on Power Automate or adjust the swagger definition using "Edit in API Designer" on SAP API Management to add PATCH to cater for this.

 

Thoughts on production readiness

SAP Integration Suite is more than ready for prime time as the de-facto standard for SAP heavy integrations.

The OAuthSAML2Bearer flow is an ever green discussed in the community at length for years and fully supported by SAP for service to service Principal Propagation.

The involved Entra ID app registration client secret can be governed with Azure automation or SAP Build Apps Process Automation. See this Microsoft article and this GitHub repos for reference.

Applying the battle-proven API management policy from the API hub ensures a configuration driven approach and clear update paths.

PowerAutomate also supports Principal Propagation with SuccessFactors directly. However, that would be a point-to-point integration without the governance and security benefits of having an API Management solution in between.

The SAP and Microsoft low code eco system is a natural fit for productivity across business needs that involve M365 (Microsoft Graph, Teams, Outlook, SharePoint Online, etc.) and SAP.

In terms of governance, SAP offers extensive integration with the Microsoft ecosystem. See this co-authored blog about SAP API Management integrating Azure APIs and this one about Azure API Center to handle a multitude of gateways in a single place.

 

Final Words

That’s a wrap 🌯. Today you saw how to extend the learnings from the first blog to enable SAP SuccessFactors for Power Automate with Principal Propagation through Microsoft Entra ID. The approach maps Microsoft identities to SAP named users to retain its SAP authorizations. In addition to that you learnt that a provided SAP API Management policy performs the heavy lifting of the authentication flow.

App developers and low coders no longer need to deal with the complexity of the principal propagation and get added benefit of token caching, and CSRF handling out-of-the-box.

Get started from here.

#Kudos to Martin Raepple for the contribution of the tricky part of the token dance.

Cheers

@vinayak_adkoli and Martin

entry.title: Re: FILTER Button in TABLE CONTROL
entry.content: Please send me the sample code .

entry.title: Re: Why S/4HANA Extensibility Options are crucial.
entry.content:
Hi Robert,

this series of articles is an excellent and holistic summary of the topic. I think it captures the challenges and basically shows the essence of what we do at SAP, together with partners and customers. (Beyond providing the business solutions of course.)

Regards, Oliver

entry.title: Re: Cloud Foundry app stops on its own by provisioned_use...
entry.content:
Hello Daria,

This is the expected behaviour for trial accounts as documented in the BTP help portal:

"Applications are stopped at midnight (or some time later depending on server load) relative to the region in which you created your trial account. If you're working in a time zone that is far from the region where your trial account was created, then your applications may stop during business hours."

entry.title: HANA DB migration
entry.content:
Hi,

can we have multiple data volumes for HANA DB? as during the installation, it gives option to choose the data volume, but if i need to have say 2 location for the data volume. How can i do this?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP API Management - OAuth 2.0 authentication with Su...
entry.content: Here is the blog that references the new policy on Entra ID + SuccessFactors: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/perform-sap-principal-propagation-with-microsoft-entra-id-for-sap/ba-p/13860532

entry.title: Re: FILTER Button in TABLE CONTROL
entry.content: I need same requirment but need data declration type also .

entry.title: Re: FILTER Button in TABLE CONTROL
entry.content: How?

entry.title: Re: Outbound Delivery show error msg: VL063
entry.content:
Hi @Vivek_Savant,

Based on your example, there are 10 units in the order, and the over-delivery tolerance is 10%,

so delivery can be made to 10x(1+10%)=11 units, the quantity is consistent with your conclusion.

 

In my example, the order units are 420,000, the over-delivery tolerance is 10%, and each schedule line is 210,000 units.

My delivery should be 420,000x(1+10%)=462,000 units, and I have already delivered 225,000 units,

so wouldn’t the remaining deliverables be 462,000-225,000=237,000 units? But I was wrong to even deliver 142,000 units.

Best Regard

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Great to have so many newcomers joining us in the past weeks! A warm welcome to all!

entry.title: How to generate a SAC Modell from an exsiting SAC dataset?
entry.content:
Hi,

i use a dataset in a story.

now i would like to use a ,model for this datset in this story. 

How to generate a SAC Modell from this exsiting dataset and to use this new model in the existing story, without creating a full new story? 

br Oliver

entry.title: Re: Custom code analysis for SAP S/4HANA with SAP Fiori App Custom Code Migration

Thanks!!

please open an incident under component BC-SRV-APS-EXT-BO. 

Best regards,

Yasmina

Please check 3268639 - XML Attachments of SAP Note 2436688 give Serialization Error.

Regards,

Prithviraj

exactly, because the usage data is decisive for the obsolete code detection, not analysis results.

Olga.

entry.title: Re: Need help in xml schema based SAP adobe forms for change PO
entry.content: Need urgent support here ...

entry.title: Re: BusinessObject DEV CMS DB deleted .How to refresh it...
entry.content: Yes I have checked the windows event logs, It showing Central Management Server stopped, and error is : The root server reported an error Initialization Failure. (Reason: CMS system database is overloaded, please try again. If the problem persists, please contact the system administrator(FWB 00027)CMS system database is overloaded, please try again. If the problem persists, please contact the system administrator(FWB 00027) CacheObjectIDs ).

entry.title: Re: PCE Brownfield migration procedure.
entry.content: For 1, part of the package for a brownfield project, not on the BoM, not charged separately for the standard timelines, but provided and available for you to use. - 1 VM for 12 months (default) or - 2 VMs for 6 months.

entry.title: Re: Displaying Equipment Details on Service Map / FSM
entry.content:
Hi,

Service Map currently does not support visualising equipment details. This is part of our roadmap : https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800002022&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q4%202024;INNO=000D3ABE772D1EDCA5952576D1ACCF67

The CSMapEquipmentDetail-[screenconfigurator], screenconfniguration was part of the old service map which has been sunset. This screen configuration will be removed in upcoming releases.

Thanks

Nishant

entry.title: How to Customize Order Forms (CSV Output) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello.

 

I am currently looking to customize a purchase order to fit a given EDI site and output to CSV.

What is the best way to achieve a highly flexible customization?

entry.title: Re: ALV help:Dropdown using REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY.
entry.content: Link not found

entry.title: Re: How to remove the SAP login in branded MDK app ?
entry.content:
@Sourabh1 

In an MDK-based app, the login screen displayed on the client comes from the IdP configured in the BTP subaccount trust configuration. You need to configure your IdP in the BTP trust setup to handle the authentication flow.

entry.title: Re: SAP DRC & S/4HANA: Do I also need Ariba Central Invoi...
entry.content:
Dear Janni,

For which country you want to implement? 

The flow is S4 -> DRC ce -> Tax authority 

In the incoming scenario are the tax authorities pushing the invoice payload or supplier is sending?

Does the payload/json/xml have all the info needed to create a MIRO?
Regards
Arun

entry.title: SAP CPI Groovy Script Blanked Out
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing a bit of a situation - we were working on developing an integration and had deployed it last night and everything looked good.

This morning, we opened it and the Groovy Script has gone blank - it shows 0 bytes.

We tried to download from deployed and reupload from Manage Integration Content, but it still shows 0 bytes.

If anyone has any ideas on how to recover it, it would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Sarthak

entry.title: Re: How to assign Users as Approver and Requester in SAP...
entry.content:
OK, now I'm further confused. 

  • Why does each user needs his/her own subaccount?
  • A user does not really belong o a subaccoun, hey belong to an IDP that defines a set of users. Each subaccount can form a trust with an IDP and then recognize those users within that subaccount. 
  • You said you created a BTP account for each user. You mean a BTP global account, nit just subaccount?
  • And it doesn't make sense to me that users would have multiple Inboxes.

I think we need to clarify the landscape you want to have -- IDPs, global accounts, subaccounts, users.

I imagine there are scenarios of federation, like a company with BTP buys a subsidiary with a different BTP and there is a need to unify things, but I'm not an expert there. 

@beapasch-- maybe you can help or refer his to someone

entry.title: SAP on IBM i Webcast: IBM i Migrate While Active Feature and SAP System Resiliency using IBM Power
entry.content:
In October 2024, IBM has announced IBM i Migrate While Active which provides the capability to safely and easily migrate an IBM i partition with minimum production downtime. Details about this offering can be found at https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/ibm-i-migrate-while-active.

In the next SAP on IBM i Webcast, IBM i Chief Engineer and Senior Technical Staff Member Kris Whitney will explain IBM i Migrate While Active and present further enhancements to improve IBM Power resiliency for your SAP environments on IBM i now, or later when running SAP S/4HANA on IBM Power servers.

The webcast is scheduled for Wednesday, December 11th, 2024, at 4 pm CET, 10 am EST, 8:30 pm IST. Please visit the website at https://ibm.biz/Webcast_SAP_on_IBM_i to register for the webcast. In reply, you will receive a calendar entry to your email address with all the information that you need to join the webcast. As usual, questions are welcome during the session. Some general Q&A time is also reserved at the end of the webcast for whatever else you may have in mind, and for your suggestions about possible topics for future webcasts. If you can’t make the live session, we will have a replay available for registrants.

We hope to see you there!

entry.title: Re: SAC chart variance - "The time dimension does not have a valid hierarchy." error
entry.content:
Hi @StFr,

The first step would be to go through S-Note 3157462, as your time dimension is apparently not recognized as such.

Then you need to define your scenario, and set your query / CDS view / ... so you have different measures for different time ranges. Then you can use these measures in the variance.

Cheers,

Stéphane

entry.title: Both "Inactive" and "Active" are set to "No"; set at least one of them to "Yes" [OCRD.validFor][line
entry.content:
Dear all,

While uploading email address of business partner then DTW is showing error like Both "Inactive" and "Active" are set to "No"; set at least one of them to "Yes" [OCRD.validFor][line: 0]65171

 

SAP Business One 10.0 SQL Version, DTW

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: SAP Identity Management Eclipse plugin 8.8.45 not ava...
entry.content:
Hi,

As an exception, this particular patch was delivered via Software Download Center as described in SAP Note 3458240 - JDBC URL password masking not working properly - SAP for Me.

Best regards,

Slavena

entry.title: How can auto-approval of a form be achieved in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a workflow requirement where the initial form fields (Form 1) should be non-editable. Once the form reaches 3 months from the created date, it should move to the next step (Form 2), where all the fields should become editable. I tried updating the task to "Completed" using Postman, but I am encountering the following error. Is there anyway to achieve form auto approval after 3 months? Kindly help us to over come this issue. 

Thanks,

Narenthiran Annamalai.

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Workflow Management, process visibility capability #Auto Approval Form

entry.title: Re: SAP CLOUD ALM API & Integration: Tasks/User Stories/Defects to Azure DevOps Work Item
entry.content:
Hi Claudius,

In this blog, it is only outbound from SAP Cloud ALM.

I used SAP CPI as middleware to enable the bi-directional integration as Azure Dev Ops can't use directly the SAP Cloud ALM Task API to update the tasks.

Best regards,

Xavier

entry.title: how do i use alternative posting keys for customer line items in a BAPI posting to create FI doc?
entry.content:
hi, 

I'm writing an ABAP to post a customer document in FI, that contain other GL / Tax items. 

i need to use a different posting key (other than default  11 for a credit to a customer line). 

I would like to use '14' for the credit. 

 

I used: 

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST'
  EXPORTING
    documentheader = wa_header
  TABLES
    accountreceivable = lt_accountrec
    accountgl      = lt_accountgl
    currencyamount = lt_item_currency
    accounttax     = lt_item_tax
    return         = lt_return.

 

where

 lt_accountgl        TYPE TABLE OF bapiacgl09,
      lt_item_currency  TYPE TABLE OF bapiaccr09,
      lt_accountrec     TYPE TABLE OF bapiacar09,
      lt_extension        TYPE TABLE OF bapiextc ,
      lt_item_tax       TYPE TABLE OF bapiactx09,
      lt_return         TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2. 

 

 

i used EXTENSION  to populate bschl (posting key) of the customer line item in my document. 

while moving through the BAPI, I saw that ACCIT had the posting key substituted for the customer line (based on the extension), and it was carried through in T_ACCIT / C_ACCIT tables while moving through BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST. But eventually, there was a function CHECK_AND_FILL_ACC_DOCUMENT. 

in here, 

PERFORM fill_bapi_accit 

TABLES account_receivable....

account_gl...

currency_amount... 

Only pure GL items remain in the account_gl table.

The posting key that i wanted for the customer line disappeared.  Consequently, when the document was posted, i did not have '14' as the credit posting key. It was the default '11' instead. 

Does any one know how i can push in my own posting key for customer line?

I'm using ECC 6 EHP 8.

entry.title: Re: SAP DRC & S/4HANA: Do I also need Ariba Central Invoi...
entry.content:
Dear Arun,

thank you for your reply.

We want to implement it in Germany.

The supplier is sending the invoices – so the incoming flow is

Supplier -> DRC CE -> S/4 OnPrem

The file should contain all the info for a MIRO posting – but sometimes fields are missing or in a wrong format (like a digit of our PO number is missing).

Is there a way to process the values to MIRO and complete the missing/wrong fields (without the detour via Ariba Central Invoice Management or any other inbound automation solution?

 

Thanks & best regards Janni

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps for SAP Business One, the next-gen Development Environment
entry.content:
Hi @Tâm_Nguyễn,

Please follow page 50 in the new exercise about purchase requests:
https://dam.sap.com/mac/u/a/21Ec8Z4.htm?rc=10

You need to use the formula NUMBER() to convert the docentry parameter to a number. Parameters are always text in SAP Build Apps, that's why they need to be converted to number format again after the input.

entry.title: Re: changeset processing in sap cap
entry.content:
@syedimran 

Have you tried setting UI.DataFieldForAction.InvocationGrouping to "ChangeSet"?

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/cbf16c599f2d4b8796e3702f7d4aae6c

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps for SAP Business One, the next-gen Development Environment
entry.content:
Thank you so much Darius 🙂

Tam

entry.title: Re: supervisor assignment profile
entry.content: so I have a list of (200) employees , to these employees video A will be assigned and to the supervisors of those 200 employees video B will be assigned. Can I have an assignment profile that checks who are the managers of these 200 employees and assigns them video B?

entry.title: Add Individual Goals in Variable Pay Statement
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Do you know if it is possible to add individual objectives in a variable pay statement? If so, is it possible to combine this with a Bonus Assignment Statement?

Could you please provide us with a template to use as an example?

Thank you in advance for your precious assistance!!!!!

entry.title: Change Package Transport layer - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any option to change the transport layer for packages already created in Public Cloud?

The field is disabled:

I know that I could create a new package with the transport layer properly indicated at creation and move all objects, but there are a lot of them, so it should be the very last option (unless there is an option to massive change all objects from old package to the new one, in ADT I didn't see that option, only 1 by 1).

The main reason is obvious: we cannot transport requests with out transport layer. I know it is also possible to update the Target system directly in the requests, but not sure if it could generate some inconsistencies. And furthermore, it should be done every time we create a new transport with objects inside the package without transport layer.

Updating TDEVC table is neither allowed on Public Cloud. 

For onpremise systems it can be done in SE80 without problems.

 

Thanks a lot,

Kr,

Agustín.

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content: Is there an option to enable or disable the settings to upload data to the parent node. This might cause issues, because the end users can load parent data into the model which can cause data aggregation discrepancies.

entry.title: Re: SAP_IPA_28014: The requested Document Information Ext...
entry.content: Hi, there is a workaround for the issue now: You can remove and recreate your SAP Build Process Automation subscription. After this, it will be possible to add the Document Information Extraction feature in SBPA. Unfortunately we do not have a solution yet that would fix this without the need to recreate the SBPA subscription. We are working on this with high priority.

entry.title: HCM Adoption Mission - "SuccessFactors Latest Goals Universal Push Customer Enablement Session"(APJ)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the option "Yes" to "Will you be attending?" will NOT register you for the event. To register for the event, please REGISTER HERE in order to receive the event invite and login details. 

“SuccessFactors Latest Goals Universal Push Customer Enablement Session” Global Series

The migration from the legacy version of Goal Management to the latest version is approaching. This process will occur in two phases: the initial migration is scheduled for 29th March 2025, and the subsequent one on 27th December, 2025. We invite you to attend our informative sessions to learn about the migration criteria, receive essential notes for cycle planning, explore additional feature plans, and understand the legacy feature deprecation schedule. We encourage you to come prepared with any questions you may have.

For more information on the rest of the series, visit the SAP Community Blog.

 

APJ – Tuesday 11th February 2025
10:00 am SGT Singapore
REGISTRATION

 

If you have any questions, please get in touch with the VIP Program Managers: 

vanesa.medricka@sap.com and samanta.ferreri@sap.com

“SuccessFactors Latest Goals Universal Push Customer Enablement Session” Global Series

The migration from the legacy version of Goal Management to the latest version is approaching. This process will occur in two phases: the initial migration is scheduled for 29th March 2025, and the subsequent one on 27th December, 2025. We invite you to attend our informative sessions to learn about the migration criteria, receive essential notes for cycle planning, explore additional feature plans, and understand the legacy feature deprecation schedule. We encourage you to come prepared with any questions you may have.

For more information on the rest of the series, visit the SAP Community Blog.

 

EMEA – Tuesday 18th February 2025
10:00 am CST Europe

If you have any questions, please get in touch with the VIP Program Managers: 

vanesa.medricka@sap.com and samanta.ferreri@sap.com

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Connecting to Messaging Systems using the AMQP Adapter
entry.content:
Hi @mandy_krimmel,

I´m writting to close the issue, I´ve read the message from the queue with Node.js script, printed the full content, and found the following:

- Generated message in EM, has three parts: source, target, payload

- The payload-chunk contains the CPI Exchange payload.

- The CPI Exchange headers/properties did not inform the source-properties-correlationID, but the payload-properties block.

At least now we now where to find that correlationID to complete the pattern, but it seems weird, that I wasn´t able to inform the source-properties-correlationID node.

Thanks again.

Mikel

entry.title: Performance optimization of long running queries( CDS Views) in AFO Connecting from SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi team,

could you please let me know how can we optimize long running queries ( CDS Consumption Views) when consuming in AFO for reporting through SAP Public Cloud?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office

entry.title: Re: Specific Billing Cycles in Subscriptions
entry.content:
Thank you for very good documentation. One question a bit related to this. How would you solve this case in pricing and billing for a subscription:

Our customer would like to have one Rate Element with recurring price specified in Lookup table with a montly price per number of users (each), but they still want to have a quartly billing cycle. Price from standard Lookup table will then be assumed to be the quarterly price and not a monthly price X 3. What would be the best way of setting up this?

entry.title: Re: Which JavaScript functions are supported in Business...
entry.content:
"JavaScript expressions used to define variables, conditions and input fields in business rule actions should be based on the ECMAScript 6 standard."

Aside from ECMAScript 6 expressions we support the following commands:

  • Comparing two arrays
arrays.equals(array1, array2)
  • Comparing two arrays ignoring the order
arrays.equalsIgnoreOrder(array1, array2)

  • Getting a translated string

i18n.translate(language, key, [argument1[, argument2[, ...[, argumentN]]]])

  • Convert an Identifier to a UUID

fsm.identifierToUUID(id)

  • Convert a UUID to an Identifier

     
fsm.UUIDToIdentifier(uuid)

entry.title: Re: Hello SAP Community,Time and Cost Collection for Qual...
entry.content: Given the importance of labor time and cost tracking for quality inspections—such as incoming inspections, final control after goods receipt from production, and other inspection types—it would be helpful to understand the standard features and variants available within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for this purpose. Specifically, I’m interested in learning: What are the standard ways to collect labor time and costs associated with quality inspections, especially for activities that are not part of production sequences (routing) like incoming inspections, goods receipt inspections from production, and etc.? Are there any existing tools, apps, or configurations in the public cloud that help track costs and time spent on quality inspections in these areas, even if QM orders are not available? Is there any integration with time tracking functionalities for this purpose? Understanding the available options will help us plan how best to manage and optimize quality inspection processes and their associated costs in the cloud. Looking forward to any further insights that anybody can share. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Which JavaScript functions are supported in Business Rules (SAP Field Service Management)
entry.content: What are the exact needs you have?

entry.title: Re: Financial Accounting for Intercompany Dual Service Order Scenario in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Artem, Great work and Job well done. Thank you!

Do you know if this scenario works with WBS element assignment?

First service order shall be assigned to WBS element in commercial entity (1710) and Second service order  shall be assigned to WBS element in execution entity (1010). Will this work in this scenario?

entry.title: Differentiate your business by standardizing - the clean core approach ✨
entry.content: 🚀Join us for an engaging and unscripted talk titled "Differentiate Your Business by Standardizing - The Clean Core Approach," where we explore the transformative power of standardization in setting your business apart. In this candid session, our thought leaders Phil and Paul will delve into the concept of the "clean core"—a streamlined and standardized operational foundation that can drive efficiency, consistency, and innovation. This interactive talk offers a unique opportunity to gain fresh perspectives and practical insights into implementing standardized processes that empower your organization. Whether you are a business leader, manager, or aspiring entrepreneur, you will leave with actionable strategies to differentiate your business by leveraging the benefits of a clean core. Join us for a thought-provoking conversation that promises to inspire and equip you with the tools to thrive in today's competitive marketplace. You are invited to submit questions for a live Q&A with the speakers.

entry.title: Change valuation class for multiple periods/single period
entry.content:
Hi,

For my customer I need to change the valuation class for a set of materials. Something has changed since I've done this a couple of years ago.

In the material master I now see several periods that have a valuation class field that can be changed. One on every tab for current period (6), previous period (5) and last period of previous fiscal year (12/2024)

The SAP help text still states to clear all stocks for current and previous period and mark the open PO's (and STO's) with a deletion indicator before you can make any changes.

I found out that if I delete the PO items and clear the stock for this period only I can change the valuation class of period 6. Because I did not clear the stock in period 5 it still gives me the error message and shows it has stock there.

Question to you all is: If I clear the stock for period 6, change the valuation class and put back the stock, what will happen when we go to period 7? Will SAP use the valuation class of period 6 as the new valuation class for period 7?

entry.title: Re: Starting out developing skills in analytics? Not sure where to start?
entry.content:
Hi @MarkGreen,

I am planning for the SAP Data Analyst Exam as I am very much interested in SAP Analytics, I am excited to announce that I have completed 2 learning journeys, 1- Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud and 2- Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud.
Now I have moved towards 3- Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning.
After that, I will attempt my exam after getting attempt. 
I am open to any suggestions and advices.
Thanks & regards,
Mehar Ali

entry.title: Re: Custom Field ME51n
entry.content: me too

entry.title: Apply selected value as a filter after action is performed in cap
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have an action process status, once i select the record and click on the action, I will update one of the columns in the list report. How do we set the filter to the selected line item

Please clone the project https://github.com/Learnings-1/fiori-elements-incident-management.git

Below is the screenshot, where i will select multiple records and click on process. Once process is pressed I will change some of the columns and once this is done I want to set the identifier in the filter so that user can easily see the records.

i did an enhancement in SAP to trigger an Idoc with the PR details whenever a PR is created. The only thing i am missing here is that to check which Idoc has been triggered for a particular PR. Can anyone please let me know the process to attach the Idoc to the PR.

Thanks and Regards,

entry.title: How to save/export business rules to PDF - truncates long lines
entry.content:
Hi there,

I'm trying to save a business rule to a PDF, but many of the statements are truncated when I try to print.

e.g. part of the rule looks like this:

But when I try to print / save to PDF (in landscape), it cuts off the longer statements so they can't be seen:

Does anyone know of a clever way to print/save this, without having to individually screenshot each page?

Many thanks,
Alan

entry.title: INSERT AN IMAGE INTO ADOBE FORMS
entry.content: I have an interface for adobe form which is connected with 6 adobe forms and I want to insert an SE78 image into 2 of these forms without changing the interface. could that happen in some way?

entry.title: Re: unable to insert record to A_BusinessPartnerAddress -...

entry.title: Postprocess button in confirmation
entry.content:
Dear all

Confirmation are done for operations of production orders in transaction CO12.

Now and then we see a button in the confirmation: Postprocess. When we get COGI errors normally the errors are shown in transaction COGI. However, if the button Postprocess appears the COGI errors are not shown in transaction COGI. First the user has to press 'Postprocess'' and then the COGI errors can be followed up in transaction COGI.

See attached screenprint. Can somebody please explain why this button appears? Can somebody please provide solution that the COGI errors are shown automatically in transaction COGI (without having the 'Postprocess button').

entry.title: Solution to automatically update CDC schema field
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a possibility to automatically sync 2 fields in CDC schema , between a standard field and a custom data field.

Thanks, Mani

Any solution for that.

Thank you and regards,
Aneta

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Re: Public Dimension Table Import Job Error
entry.content: Hi, I have the same issue on a couple of our dimensions. In our environment there are 3 copies of one dimension that import from the same master data. One is working and 2 others not.

entry.title: Re: changeset processing in sap cap
entry.content:
i think you want the same as in this improvement suggestion?

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/310291

entry.title: Re: Public Dimension Table Import Job Error
entry.content: SAP Note 3538935 indicates that this is an issue caused by the Q4 drop

entry.title: Country field not appearing on the Address in output Forms for sales documents
entry.content:
The Country field is not appearing for the address of the standard output forms, such as Sales Order Confirmation, Delivery Note, and Invoice. 

It needs to be printed by standard on all our customer facing forms. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Country field not appearing on the Address in output...
entry.content:
As standard the country will not be displayed as part of the address in the output if the sender and receiver countries are the same. This is explained in further detailed through the following link:

 > Country Formatting

To have this field visible in these circumstances an extensibility implementation is required. Steps for extending a standard form can be found in the following link:

> How to Extend a Custom Form Template

entry.title: Re: MB5B negative opening period stock altough no materia...
entry.content: Could please tick archive material document and then execute the report
